title: Unlimited Tools MCP permissioned tool profiles (E09 design)
description: DESIGN (E09): named tool profiles for the Unlimited Tools gateway (docs/mcp-permissioned-tool-profiles.md). A profile controls which upstream tools an agent can SEE (visible: filters tools_search and gates tools_schema) and which it can CALL (callable: gates tools_call). Callable is always a subset of visible. Rules are fully qualified '<upstream>.<tool>' strings in exactly two forms: an exact name, or '<upstream>.*' covering one whole upstream — no regex, no partial globs, no wildcard upstream segment. With a profile active, anything not explicitly allowed is invisible and uncallable (default deny); a missing or invalid profile fails closed (refusal codes -32013 / -32014). Semantic load rules (extends must exist, no self-reference, no cycles, chain depth <= 8, every callable rule covered by a visible rule) are enforced by the gateway at load time; this schema enforces the structural format.

default_profile.description: Profile applied when neither --profile nor UNLIMITED_SKILLS_MCP_PROFILE selects one. Must name an existing profile in 'profiles' (semantic load check). Selection precedence: CLI flag > env var > this default; nothing resolved is refused fail-closed with profile_not_found (-32013), never open behavior.

signature.description: Optional forward-compatible detached-signature envelope, reserved for the future profile-signing gate (Gate C). Computed over the canonical JSON (UTF-8, sorted keys, no insignificant whitespace) of this document with the 'signature' member removed. In v1 the gateway validates this shape only and NEVER verifies signatures — presence grants nothing and blocks nothing.

algorithm.description: Placeholder algorithm enum; the signing gate owns the final algorithm and key-format decisions.

key_id.description: Opaque identifier of the signing key. Never a key value.

profiles.description: Map of profile name -> profile. Names share the upstream-name grammar. With a profile active, default deny: a tool is visible/callable only if a rule matches it.

extends.description: Single parent profile in this file (no multiple inheritance). Inheritance is restriction-only: the child's effective sets are intersected with the parent's — a child can narrow but never widen. Self-reference, cycles, dangling names, and chains deeper than 8 are load errors (profile_invalid, -32014).

visible.description: Visibility rules: exact '<upstream>.<tool>' or '<upstream>.*' (whole upstream). Filters tools_search and gates tools_schema; an invisible tool is refused with tool_not_visible (-32011), indistinguishable from a nonexistent one. Absent: a child inherits the parent's set; a root profile denies everything.

callable.description: Callability rules, same grammar; gates tools_call. Always a subset of visible: every rule here must be covered by this profile's visible rules (load check), and evaluation additionally requires visibility. A visible-but-not-callable tool is refused with tool_not_callable (-32012). Absent: a child inherits the parent's set; a root profile denies everything.
